last_assistant_message:
FEAT-258 implementation complete.

## Report

**Status:** PASS. Build clean. 13/13 filtered tests pass (8 service + 5 controller).

**Files changed (6):**
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-followups/src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptIngestService.cs` — added `ILogger<TranscriptIngestService>` ctor dep, `failedAtomCount` counter, structured `LogWarning` on `ErrorStatus != 0`, propagation into result
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-followups/src/AstraMemory.Application/Features/TranscriptIngest/ITranscriptIngestService.cs` — added `FailedAtomCount` between `ExtractedCount` and `ClientScrubHits` on `TranscriptIngestResult`
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-followups/src/AstraMemory.Api/Models/IngestTranscriptResponse.cs` — added `failed_atom_count` JSON field
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-followups/src/AstraMemory.Api/Controllers/TranscriptIngestController.cs` — mapped new field through
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-followups/tests/AstraMemory.Tests/TranscriptIngest/TranscriptIngestServiceTests.cs` — added `NullLogger` to existing 7 ctors; added 8th test asserting `FailedAtomCount==1`, warning logged, linker not called
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-followups/tests/AstraMemory.Tests/Controllers/TranscriptIngestControllerTests.cs` — updated 3 positional `TranscriptIngestResult` constructions for the new field

(6 files, not 5 as the spec hinted — the controller test file was also necessary because it builds positional `TranscriptIngestResult` instances that would otherwise fail to compile. The spec actually explicitly called this out in step 6.)

**Test run:** `Passed: 13, Failed: 0, Skipped: 0` (filter `TranscriptIngestServiceTests|TranscriptIngestControllerTests`).

**Commit SHA:** `22be7b7e` on `chore/transcript-ingest-followups` (branch now 2 commits ahead of origin/main).

**ILogger mocking decision:** Mocking `ILogger<T>.Log` via Moq is notoriously messy because the state and formatter use internal types. Instead I introduced a small private `CaptureLogger<T> : ILogger<T>` test double inside the test class that just increments `WarningCount` when `LogLevel.Warning` is emitted. The new failure test uses it and asserts `WarningCount == 1`. Existing 7 tests use `NullLogger<TranscriptIngestService>` from `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions` (no Moq overhead, no behavior assertions needed).

**Self-review checklist:**
- Ctor takes 5 deps now (added ILogger). YES
- `FailedAtomCount` propagated through Result + Response. YES
- LogWarning fires exactly once per failed atom with structured fields (TenantId, ProjectId, AtomType, TitlePreview, ErrorStatus, ErrorMessage). YES
- Title is truncated to 80 chars in the structured field. YES
- Controller test updated for new positional shape. YES
- 8/8 service tests + 5/5 controller tests pass. YES

**Concerns:** None on ILogger mocking. Build emits only pre-existing warnings (NU1507 package source warnings, an EFCore version pin warning, and the obsolete `AdminAuthHelper` warning — all unrelated to FEAT-258). DI auto-resolves `ILogger<TranscriptIngestService>` since ASP.NET Core registers the open generic by default — no DI changes needed in `Program.cs` or `DependencyInjection.cs`.

background_tasks.description: Wait until PR mergeable state resolves
background_tasks.command: cd "C:/work/mega/memory" && until [ "$(gh pr view 288 --json mergeable -q .mergeable)" != "UNKNOWN" ]; do sleep 15; done && echo "mergeable: $(gh pr view 288 --json mergeable -q .mergeable)" && gh pr checks 288 2>&1 | head -20
